# @formosaic/mui

> Material UI (MUI) field components for @formosaic/core. Provides 13 editable and 6 read-only field types plus a one-line registry setup.

- Docs: [README](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/tree/main/packages/mui/README.md)
- Agent instructions: [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/tree/main/packages/mui/AGENTS.md)
- npm: [@formosaic/mui](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@formosaic/mui)
- License: MIT
- Peer dependencies: `react`, `react-dom`, `react-hook-form`, `@mui/material` (v5 or v6), `@formosaic/core`
- Required runtime dependencies: `@emotion/react`, `@emotion/styled` (MUI peer deps)

## API Surface

### Registry
- `createMuiFieldRegistry()` -- Creates the default Material UI field registry (`Record<string, React.JSX.Element>`) for use with `InjectedFieldProvider`

### Editable Field Components (13)
- `HookTextbox` -- Single-line text input (MUI `TextField`)
- `HookNumber` -- Numeric input
- `HookToggle` -- Boolean toggle switch
- `HookDropdown` -- Single-select dropdown
- `HookMultiSelect` -- Multi-select checkboxes
- `HookMultiSelectSearch` -- Multi-select with search/filter
- `HookDateControl` -- Date picker
- `HookSlider` -- Range slider
- `HookFragment` -- Dynamic fragment container
- `HookPopOutEditor` -- Expandable text editor / textarea
- `HookDocumentLinks` -- URL link CRUD
- `HookStatusDropdown` -- Status dropdown with color indicators

### Read-Only Field Components (6)
- `HookReadOnly` -- Read-only text display
- `HookReadOnlyArray` -- Read-only array/list display
- `HookReadOnlyDateTime` -- Read-only date/time display
- `HookReadOnlyCumulativeNumber` -- Read-only cumulative number display
- `HookReadOnlyRichText` -- Read-only rich text/HTML display
- `HookReadOnlyWithButton` -- Read-only text with action button

### Supporting Components
- `ReadOnlyText` -- Shared read-only text display component
- `StatusMessage` -- Error/warning/saving status display
- `HookFormLoading` -- Shimmer/skeleton loading state

### Helpers
- `FieldClassName()` -- Build CSS class name with optional error state
- `GetFieldDataTestId()` -- Build data-testid attribute from field metadata
- `formatDateTime()` -- Format date string for display
- `DocumentLinksStrings` -- Default string literals for document links UI

### Types
- `IReadOnlyFieldProps` -- Props for ReadOnlyText component
- `IDocumentLink` -- Document link data type

## Code Example

### Minimal Setup with Material UI

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider, createTheme } from "@mui/material/styles";
import { CssBaseline } from "@mui/material";
import {
  RulesEngineProvider,
  InjectedFieldProvider,
  Formosaic,
  IFormConfig,
} from "@formosaic/core";
import { createMuiFieldRegistry } from "@formosaic/mui";

const theme = createTheme();

const formConfig: IFormConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: {
    title: { type: "Textbox", required: true, label: "Title" },
    status: {
      type: "Dropdown",
      label: "Status",
      options: [
        { value: "draft", label: "Draft" },
        { value: "active", label: "Active" },
      ],
    },
  },
  fieldOrder: ["title", "status"],
};

function App() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider theme={theme}>
      <CssBaseline />
      <RulesEngineProvider>
        <InjectedFieldProvider injectedFields={createMuiFieldRegistry()}>
          <Formosaic
            configName="myForm"
            formConfig={formConfig}
            entityData={{ title: "", status: "draft" }}
            onSave={(data) => console.log("Saved:", data)}
          />
        </InjectedFieldProvider>
      </RulesEngineProvider>
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```
